mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_history ( history_id, task_id, changed_by, action_type, action_at ) VALUES ( task_history_seq.NEXTVAL, #{taskId}, #{changedBy}, #{actionType}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO task_history_detail ( detail_id, history_id, field_name, old_value, new_value ) VALUES ( task_history_detail_seq.NEXTVAL, #{historyId}, #{fieldName}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue} )
